---
title: "Writing"
aliases:
  - /tech-blog
  - /my-notes
listing:
  sort: "date desc"
  contents:
    - "posts"
    - "notes"
  feed: true
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
  categories: false
page-layout: full
---

Essays on agents, evals, post-training, model systems, and the practice of building with AI. Plus shorter notes and reflections.

I also publish a weekly newsletter at [The Conductor](https://conductorbyam.substack.com/).
